labels.title: Glossary
labels.caseSensitiveHint: Match this term with exact case (e.g., "Emperor" vs "emperor")
labels.notesHint: e.g., "Bretonnian is not gendered in English but can be Bretonnien/Bretonnienne in French"
labels.notesHelper: Optional hints for the translator about gender, context, or usage

actions.closeTab: Please close the browser tab to cancel the migration.

dialogs.deleteEntryMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the entry "$source → $target"?
dialogs.migrationSubtitle: Glossaries are now strictly game-specific. Resolve the following items to continue.
dialogs.deleteUniversalWarning: Deleted glossaries cannot be recovered. Export to CSV first if you want a backup.
dialogs.deleteUniversalBody: The following $glossaryCount are marked "— Don't convert —" and will be permanently deleted:

messages.selectGameForGlossary: Select a game from the sidebar to view its glossary.
messages.noProjectsYet: No projects yet for $game. A glossary will be generated automatically when you create your first project.
messages.noTargetLanguages: No target languages configured for projects of $game yet. A glossary will be generated when you add a language to a project.
messages.selectTargetLanguage: Select a target language to view its glossary.
messages.noEntriesYet: No entries yet. Import a CSV or add your first entry.
messages.unableToResolveLanguage: Unable to resolve target language for this glossary.
messages.pleaseSelectFile: Please select a file to import
messages.universalsWillBeDeleted: Universal glossaries not converted will be deleted permanently.
messages.duplicatesWillBeMerged: These glossaries will be merged automatically. Duplicate entries (same source term, case-insensitive) will be deduplicated, keeping the most recent one.

errors.sourceTermTooLong: Source term must be 200 characters or less
errors.targetTermTooLong: Target term must be 200 characters or less

empty.adjustSearchOrFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters
empty.addEntriesToStart: Add entries to this glossary to get started
empty.createGlossaryHint: Create a glossary to manage your translation terminology

hints.skipDuplicatesHint: Existing entries will not be overwritten
